arts.ttl: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke goes ballistic as referee 'bottled' big Preston North End decision
arts.sum: Tempers boiled over in the first half of Leeds United's clash with Preston North End. Trailing 1-0 after a 23rd minute strike from Brad Potts, the Whites felt the hosts should later have had a man sent off. It was a poor challenge and referee John Busby spoke to Whiteman but the North End player somehow escaped a second yellow card.

arts.ttl: 'A blistering break!' | Potts puts Preston ahead against Leeds
arts.sum: Milutin Osmajic races down the right flank before picking out Brad Potts in the middle.

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Wolves 'plot' transfer raid for Leeds United ace as new contract claim emerges
arts.sum: Multiple Premier League clubs are thought to be tracking Leeds United star Pascal Struijk ahead of the January transfer window. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: EFL pundits nail Leeds United's biggest issue in the Championship title race
arts.sum: Leeds United fans favourite Stuart Dallas says the Whites' away form remains their biggest issue in the race for the Championship title race this season. When asked about what his former side need to do to kick on, Dallas said: "We've seen a lot of them and I think they're exactly where they want to be at this stage of the season.

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Preston North End as Daniel Farke gets a major selection boost
arts.sum: Leeds United: Illan Meslier; Jayden Bogle, Joe Rodon, Pascal Struijk, Sam Byram; Ao Tanaka, Joe Rothwell; Daniel James, Brenden Aaronson, Wilfried Gnonto; Joel Piroe. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Player blames Leeds spell for start of match fixing problems – Went “completely off rails” at Elland Road
arts.sum: Former Leeds United man Pawel Cibicki has admitted his problems started at Elland Road, where he went “completely off the rails.” Fotboll Skanalen cover comments from the 30-year-old today made to Aftonbladet as he continues to serve a ban for match fixing. The forward was sentenced to a four-year ban by FIFA and the Swedish The post Player blames Leeds spell for start of match fixing problems – Went “completely off rails” at Elland Road appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leeds United can lay ghost to rest as Farke toils on 11th-hour knocks at Preston
arts.sum: Leeds United visit Preston North End in a 12.30pm kick-off at Deepdale today, with the chance to climb back to the top of the Championship. Gnonto did not start last Saturday and only got 69 minutes on Tuesday, so he is unlikely to have any issues with going again today.

arts.ttl: Leeds United: Sam Greenwood impressing at Preston
arts.sum: Leeds United attacking midfielder Sam Greenwood has had a solid start to life in Preston colours following his loan move in the summer. How much he’d cost is difficult to speculate, but Leeds did insert a £1.5million buy option in his Middlesbrough loan deal last season, indicating the 49ers are happy to just break even on the attacking midfielder that is contracted until 2026.

arts.ttl: Myth of Leeds United's battle against Sheffield United exposed by Championship statement
arts.sum: As two of the big hitters in the Championship Leeds and Sheffield United are expected to be challenging head-to-had for the Premier League promotion prize at stake, but as Farke was swift to point out when asked about that battle, they are not the only ones. With a tiny gap threatening to open up a the top of the Championship table, Leeds United boss Daniel Farke was asked this week about the emerging possibility of a see-saw battle with Sheffield United for top spot in the table.

arts.ttl: Leeds United stance on losing €15m asset for free and feeling they hold key cards
arts.sum: Losing Junior Firpo for free in 19 days is a possibility Leeds United are not ignoring, but Daniel Farke has no interest in drafting up new contracts for fear of losing a player. Leeds could, of course, offer him a new deal of their own, but Farke says there has been no time to discuss this with the Dominican, who must put all of his energy into recovering from his hamstring injury.
